Document:
#Knowledge Points As a Heretic, your Eldritch knowledge is what sets you above the heathens.
Collecting [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color] is your main goal, as well as your ticket to greater power.
[color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color] can be spent in the [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Store[/color] to unlock new spells and rituals.
You can gain [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color] and become stronger through a few ways: - Reading the [color=#8f63e6]Tomes[/color] that spawn randomly around the station. - [color=#8f63e6]Sacrificing[/color] crew members, whom your dark patrons hunger for. - Automatically gained every 20 minutes.
## Eldritch Tomes
[color=#8f63e6]Tomes[/color] are the easy way to gain [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color].
Each will provide a single [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Point[/color] upon use. Be mindful in your search - drawing too much attention to yourself could mean the end of your studies.
Each [color=#8f63e6]Tome[/color] can only be harvested once, so the more tomes you gain access to first, the less killing you have to do to reach [color=#8f63e6]Ascension[/color].
## Heretical Research
Once you have some [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color], it's time to research! Open up your [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Store[/color] using the action button.
Your first selection will commit you to a path that defines your initial [color=#8f63e6]Abilities[/color] and [color=#8f63e6]Ascension[/color].
You can earn [color=#8f63e6]Abilities[/color] from other paths to a limited degree, but only when you have researched sufficient knowledge from your main path.
